title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Pay Prior Year Obligations of Various Offices Amounting to One Hundred Sixty-nine Thousand Six Hundred Sixty Pesos & 06/100 (P 169,660.06) Chargeable Against the Current Appropriations for the Same Expense Items and Five Hundred Ninety-two Thousand Three Hundred Thirty-six Pesos and 31/100 (P 592,336.31) Chargeable Against the Supplemental Budget. Councilor
